---
title: "Andrew J. Liang"
about: 
  image: portrait.jpeg
  template: solana
  image-shape: rectangle
  image-width: 20em
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/andrew-j-liang/
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/andrewjliang
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:andrewliang@ucsb.edu
toc: false
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
margin-footer: |
  a.j.l. 2024.
---

## Welcome to my website!

I am a pre-Political Science major at UCSB, studying urban and judicial politics. I also enjoy learning about statistics and data visualization. Outside of school, I enjoy playing video games, competing in pickleball tournaments and leagues, photography, following the adventures (and misadventures) of the Oakland Athletics, and using dark mode for every application whenever possible.

## Education

### University of California, Santa Barbara
**B.A., Political Science (Jun. 2027)**
